marketing_seeds: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed renewal reminders cause supplier penalties. We provide automated reminders instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
Difficulty in tracking contract expiration dates and renewal reminders leads to missed opportunities and potential penalties.
